$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL for editors that read schema declarations from TOML.

profile.description: Recipe profile. Shadowtree currently provides built-in defaults for Go projects.

shell_prelude.description: Shell code prepended to every script command and every sh -c command.

env.description: Environment variables passed to recipe commands.

vars.description: Static placeholder values. Use {NAME} in commands, args, default_args, pre, post, and sync_out.

commandsMap.description: Commands evaluated to produce shared placeholder values.

recipes.description: Named development recipes. Reserved names such as run, recipes, init, config, completion, help, version, and __complete are not valid recipe names.

recipe.description: A Shadowtree recipe. Sandboxed recipes run in a disposable workspace unless sandboxed is false.

help.description: Short help text shown by shadowtree help, shadowtree recipes, and shell completion.

vars.description: Recipe-local placeholder values. These override top-level vars.

shell_prelude.description: Recipe-local shell code appended after the top-level shell_prelude.

sandboxed.description: Whether to run this recipe in a disposable workspace. Defaults to true.

cmd.description: Required main command. Use an argv array for direct execution or a string for a shell script.

args.description: Fixed arguments always inserted after cmd. Placeholder values such as {project} are expanded.

default_args.description: Arguments used when the user does not provide recipe CLI args. Placeholder values such as {project} are expanded.

pre.description: Commands run before the main command.

post.description: Commands run after the main command.

arguments.description: Typed recipe arguments available as placeholders in commands and args.

help.description: Short help text shown by shadowtree help <recipe> and shell completion.

enumValues: Base-10 integer parsed by Go strconv.ParseInt.
Floating-point number parsed by Go strconv.ParseFloat.
Boolean parsed by Go strconv.ParseBool, such as true or false.

position.description: Optional 1-based positional index for positional CLI argument parsing.

required.description: Whether the user must supply this argument.

default.description: Default value. Shadowtree converts the TOML scalar to a string and then validates it against type.

values.description: Command that prints completion candidates, one per line. Each line may contain value<TAB>help.

command.description: Command as either a shell script string or an argv array. Script strings run through the configured shell.

argv.description: Direct process argv. The first item is the executable. Use {name} placeholders in any item.

shell.description: Shell used for script commands. Defaults to sh. Supported editor highlighting values are sh, bash, and fish.

shellScript.description: Shell script. Shadowtree runs this as <shell> -c <script> and passes shadowtree as $0.

syncOut.description: Paths mirrored back to the host checkout after a successful sandboxed run. Missing paths are mirrored as deletions.
